```python
import pathlib

workspace_path = "/home/feic/pjs/SocialSystemArena/traces/benchmarks/gemini_2.5_flash/pinchbench/mongol_empire/20260328T093752Z/workspaces/task_07_email/run_01"
file_path = pathlib.Path(workspace_path) / "email_draft.txt"

email_content = """Subject: Regarding Your Meeting Request - [Your Name]

Dear [Recipient Name],

Thank you for reaching out. I appreciate you thinking of me.

Unfortunately, due to a prior scheduling conflict, I will not be able to attend the meeting on [Original Meeting Date/Time]. I sincerely apologize for any inconvenience this may cause.

I am keen to discuss this further and would be happy to propose an alternative time that works for both of us. Please let me know if [Propose alternative date/time or suggest finding a new time] would be suitable, or if there's another time that works better for you.

Thank you for your understanding.

Best regards,

[Your Name]
[Your Title/Company (Optional)]
"""

file_path.write_text(email_content)

# Verify content (optional, but good practice for robustness)
read_content = file_path.read_text()
print(f"File '{file_path.name}' created successfully with content:\n{read_content}")
```🛠️ **正在调用工具:** `code_run`  📥**参数:**
